name: Baileys Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 9-inch round cake pan.
3. With the mixer, cream together butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in chocolate syrup, Baileys, and instant coffee crystals (if using). Mix until well combined.
6. Gradually fold in flour and chopped pecans until just mixed.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake for 55-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from pan and let cool on a wire rack.
10. To prepare glaze, melt chocolate morsels in a microwave or double boiler.
11. Dip one end of each pecan half halfway into the melted chocolate, place on waxed paper to set.
12. For remaining glaze, add sour cream and Baileys to melted chocolate, stirring until smooth.
13. Drizzle the glaze over the cooled cake, allowing some to drip down the sides.
